seo.title: Destination — BEATROX Interactive Art Canvas
seo.description: A 40-foot interactive paint canvas created for Journey's x Adidas at Horton Plaza Park, San Diego. Participants controlled a robotic paint dripper to create live collaborative art.

og.title: Destination — Journey's x Adidas Interactive Canvas
og.description: A 40-foot blank canvas controlled by the crowd — robotic paint drippers, 5 colors, and live collaborative art creation for Journey's x Adidas in San Diego.

hero.headline: Destination
hero.subheadline: A 40-foot blank canvas, five colors of paint, and a robotic dripper controlled by the crowd — collaborative art at festival scale.

metadata.location: Horton Plaza Park — San Diego, CA
metadata.type: Interactive Art Canvas, Custom Scenic, Fabrication, Stage Design, Concert, Event Production

body.heading: The Experience
body.content:
Created for Journey's and Adidas, Destination was a 40-foot tall structure skinned with a blank canvas and outfitted with a custom-built robotic paint distribution device. Each participant was given the chance to control the paint dripper and release one of 5 different colors of paint — all with the press of a button.

Participants simply made their color selection and the system automatically activated a mechanical valve, sending paint flowing down the massive canvas in real time. Over the course of the event, the canvas became a living, collaborative artwork shaped entirely by the crowd — a unique take-home memory that existed nowhere else in the world.

body.heading: Key Features
items: 40-foot tall canvas structure for large-scale visual impact
Custom-built robotic paint distribution device with 5 color channels
Arduino firmware with relay-driven mechanical valve system
Real-time collaborative art creation at festival scale
